arts.ttl: “I had negotiations with Tottenham” – Defender reveals Spurs efforts to sign him from Southampton
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Paris Saint-Germain made attempts to sign Cédric Soares when he was at Southampton. That’s according to the right-back himself, and he revealed this during a chat with DAZN in Portugal and Notícias ao Minuto have relayed his comments. arts.ttl: Diego Maradona convinces Garnacho to quit Man Utd for Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli are currently in negotiations with Man Utd for Garnacho, who would be a replacement for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, who is set to join PSG this week. That is according to former Napoli and Argentina star Daniel Bertoni, who played with Maradona for both the club and the national team.

arts.ttl: Garnacho gives green light to Napoli transfer but Man Utd stand firm
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho is reportedly open to joining Napoli, but Italian sources claim Manchester United’s asking...

arts.ttl: ‘Agreement can be found’ – Belief loan with €40-50m obligation can secure Manchester United player
arts.sum: It has been widely reported in Italy that Manchester United’s Alejandro Garnacho is a target for Napoli, who are set to lose Khvicha Kvaratskhelia to Paris Saint-Germain. Yesterday, there was talk that the Naples club’s sporting director Giovanni Manna had a meeting with Garnacho’s entourage in Barcelona. More has been reported from Italy today. arts.ttl: ‘I should’ve joined Man Utd instead of Liverpool – I regretted my transfer decision’
arts.sum: Liverpool signed El Hadji Diouf in a bid to win the Premier League - but the striker struggled at Anfield and ended up regretting not joining their bitter rivals Manchester United

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye £40m goalkeeper; Liverpool in Kimmich talks
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, rumours and gossip circulating around the world includes Joshua Kimmich, Frenkie de Jong, Aurelien Tchouameni and more.

arts.ttl: Mainoo, Garnacho and Rashford ALL OUT! Man Utd eye sales before crunch deadline
arts.sum: Man Utd face race against time to stay within the Premier League’s Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) and are ready to sell three of their brightest talents in a bid to avoid a summer fire sale, according to The Telegraph . Mainoo, Garnacho and Rashford have all been earmarked for sales by owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe, who is aware of the potential severe penalties that club faces should it fail to stay within the Premier League’s financial rules.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's best summer signing could be given a new role this week
arts.sum: Man United defender Noussair Mazraoui might be given a new role by Ruben Amorim this week.

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt is starting to prove Rio Ferdinand wrong at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man United defender Matthijs de Ligt has been getting better and better in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford dealt big blow as Barcelona boss makes decision
arts.sum: Manchester United are set for a busy end to the January transfer window, with Marcus Rashford expected to leave Old Trafford after falling out of favour under Ruben Amorim
